name: Black Walnut Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook sugar, cream of tartar, salt, and milk to soft ball stage, stirring frequently.
2. Wipe down sides of pan to remove crystals.
3. Remove from heat; add butter.
4. Cool without stirring until lukewarm.
5. Add extract and nuts; beat until creamy.
6. Pour into a greased square pan; cut into squares.
7. Makes 1 1/2 pounds.
